title: Autonomous loop improvement status in operator autocycle plan summary v0
problem: Ticket-348 surfaces autonomous_loop_improvement_status in operator plan mode, but operator autocycle plan/execute JSON does not yet pass through the field for cycle visibility.
acceptance_criteria: Operator autocycle plan JSON includes autonomous_loop_improvement_status from build_operator_plan.
When loop improvement artifacts exist, autocycle summary exposes recommended_ticket_id and draft_count.
No execute-safe command allowlist changes or queue writes.
rollback_plan: Revert autocycle improvement field passthrough only.
